title: Hexcessible
description: Various accessibility tools for Hex Casting.
body:
![A dimmed Minecraft screenshot with Hexcessible tooltips on top](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bb2f12d4692e0f857985e212a03be3d8b7c77a4.jpeg)

**⚠️ Try Hex Casting without Hexcessible first. This mod may ruin the experience you could get without it, as it eases the process of casting spells. You may want to NOT use it, depending on how enjoyable and usable base Hex is for you.**

Hexcessible is an addon for the [Hex Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting) mod, easing the process of casting. Hexcessible does mot add any patterns/spells by itself. Hex Casting Addons that add generic patterns are supported out of the box.

Hexcessible lets you be rest assured you drew the correct pattern, or you can ask for help with Magic Autocomplete, which you can alias the names of, if you'd like. It also lets you cast with the keyboard.

**Hexcessible is customizable. Be sure to check the config menu in the game!**
